title: Dangerous shell execution surface
remediation: Replace shell execution with structured argument lists or isolate it behind a reviewed broker.

title: Hardcoded OpenAI-style API key material
remediation: Remove key material from the repo and load it from a secret store or deployment environment.

title: Private key material committed to the repo
remediation: Rotate the key and remove the private material from version control.

title: Wildcard tool access grant
remediation: Replace wildcard grants with an explicit allowlist and scope tools by environment or role.

title: Destructive system command fragment
remediation: Fence destructive system commands behind explicit operator approval or remove them from agent-facing code paths.

title: Direct actuator control surface reference
remediation: Audit whether the referenced actuator surface is gated by role, rate, workspace boundary, and deployment mode.

title: Dynamic code evaluation via eval or exec
remediation: Replace eval/exec with a safe, structured alternative. If evaluation is required, validate and sandbox the input before execution.

title: Insecure deserialization of untrusted data
remediation: Use safe alternatives: json, yaml.safe_load, or restrict deserialization to trusted, signed payloads.

title: Hardcoded robot or actuator network endpoint
remediation: Load robot endpoints from environment variables or a deployment-specific config file rather than hardcoding them in source.
